name: MPT-7B-Instruct
archDisplay: Decoder-only Transformer, no positional embeddings (ALiBi), FlashAttention; 32L/32H, d_model 4096
note: MPT-7B fine-tuned on Dolly-15k + Anthropic HH-RLHF (dolly_hhrlhf) for short-form instruction following; licensed CC-BY-SA-3.0 (more restrictive than the Apache-2.0 base model) due to the derived instruction dataset.

results.notes: F1 score (harness|drop|3, 3-shot = 0.2940), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 evaluation-run JSON, confirmed via direct curl+grep

5-shot accuracy (harness|gsm8k|5 = 0.0281), confirmed via direct curl+grep. Genuinely below the taxonomy's typical 5-100 range floor for this benchmark -- a real, verified very-low score for this small 2023 instruction-tuned model on GSM8K, not a transcription error.

verificationNotes: Existence and release date (2023-05-05, same announcement as base MPT-7B), fine-tuning datasets (Dolly-15k + Anthropic HH-RLHF / dolly_hhrlhf), and 6.7B params all corroborated via HF and MosaicML sources. CORRECTED the license: the input record claimed 'Apache 2.0' (with a note claiming this reversed an early CC-BY-SA-3.0 designation) — this is backwards. The official Databricks/MosaicML announcement blog explicitly states MPT-7B-Instruct is licensed CC-By-SA-3.0 (distinct from the Apache-2.0 base model and the non-commercial CC-By-NC-SA-4.0 Chat variant), and this is corroborated by the model's actual HF README frontmatter and multiple independent trackers (e.g. eugeneyan/open-llms). No results rows were present to verify (array was empty).
